name: Grupo Ezentis, S.A.
summary: Grupo Ezentis, S.A. operates telecommunications and energy infrastructures primarily in Latin America. The company engages in the operation and maintenance service of fixed or mobile telecommunications infrastructure networks, such as external landline network, deployment of fiber, customer service, corporate network operations, and operational support systems. It also offers operation and maintenance services for electricity transport, distribution, and commercialization networks, including areal and underground distribution and transport lines; transportation and distribution substations and centers; control systems; digital transformation of the grids; and smart grids. In addition, the company is involved in construction/deployment and engineering projects, such as water and gas distribution networks; development of support systems for infrastructure management; provides consultancy and projects management services, and geographic information systems; and offers network design and systems development; and outsourcing services. Further, it engages in the development of IT solutions for network management, and operation and maintenance of water networks, as well as operating networks for the mining sector. It serves telecommunications, electricity, water, gas, oil, and mining sectors. Grupo Ezentis, S.A. was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Seville, Spain.
